SELECT randPoisson(10) AS r1, randPoisson(5) AS r2 FROM numbers(5);
SELECT r1 + r2 FROM (SELECT randPoisson(10) AS r1, randPoisson(5) AS r2 FROM numbers(5));
CREATE TABLE test_aggregates AS SELECT randPoisson(10) AS random_num FROM numbers(100);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT randPoisson(10) FROM numbers(100) WHERE randPoisson(10) > 5);
SELECT randPoisson(5) FROM numbers(10) WHERE randPoisson(10) < randPoisson(20);
WITH randPoisson(10) AS r1, randPoisson(15) AS r2 SELECT r1, r2, r1 * r2 AS product FROM numbers(5);
SELECT r1 + r2 FROM (SELECT randPoisson(10) AS r1, randPoisson(15) AS r2 FROM numbers(10)) GROUP BY r1, r2;
CREATE TABLE random_tests AS SELECT randPoisson(10) AS random_value, number FROM numbers(10);
SELECT random_value FROM random_tests WHERE random_value > 8 ORDER BY random_value DESC;
